seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Severnlea and Shailer Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Severnlea vs Shailer Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Severnlea and Shailer Park.
heading: Severnlea vs Shailer Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Severnlea, Queensland and Shailer Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Severnlea has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Shailer Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Severnlea or Shailer Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Severnlea has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Shailer Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Severnlea scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Shailer Park scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Severnlea or Shailer Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Severnlea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
